title: KandyToys Responsive Bright Unicorn Light Up LED Kids Yoyo | Three Colours | Kids Toys Age 3+ | 5.5cm
features: Kids Yoyo - The KandyToys Unicorn Light Up Responsive Yoyo lets you experience a classic toy that's been popular since 1928 with a modern twist, unicorns and lights!
Magical Fun - Fill gaps of boredom with this Yoyo that will bring joy and entertainment to little unicorn lovers!
Premium Quality - Made from durable plastic to help protect the toy from accidental drops, plus the string is strong and sturdy which won't snap easily
Lights - Whilst perfecting your Yoyo skills the yoyo each flick of the wrist will activate the lights, giving kids the option to play whether its night or day
Unicorn Theme - This cute 5.5cm yoyo toy is unicorn themed available in blue, purple and pink colours (one sent at random)
description: Test your skills out in style with this Unicorn Light-up Yoyo by KandyToys. The yo-yo lights up when the string is pulled during use. Comes in 3 magical colours to choose from, yellow, dark pink and light pink, with a unicorn design on the faces of the yo-yo. Small gift perfect for stockings, or spending pocket money on!
